## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (if the dashboard changed)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/` for user-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets, keys, binaries, or logs committed
